about-hero.query: Velmora was founded on a simple belief: luxury should feel personal, not inaccessible. We spent years watching the jewelry industry promise quality but deliver markup. Pieces that looked beautiful in the campaign but arrived hollow — in both substance and feel. We knew there had to be a better way.
